title: Unvanishing
description: Adds a new enchantment "Sustaining" that maintains your item after death but with decreased durability (halved, won't get destroyed), obtainable in End city treasure chests!
body:
# Sustaining enchantment
---
## Functionality
Any tool/armor that has this enchantment will be maintained after the player's death, but **decreasing durability** after respawn by a half. (Tool will not get destroyed, as it will get set to 1 durability).

## Obtaining
End city treasure chests have a **10%** chance to have the Sustaining enchantment.

---
### Notes:
- /enchant @s unvanishing:sustaining
- Customizing values will hopefully be added in later versions.
- Reservation of the slot number is still not implemented.
